name: Memory Garden shows topic health plants or an empty garden
description: A logged-in user opens /app/memory-map and sees the real Memory Garden -- the 'Memory Garden' heading and the guidance that each plant represents a topic whose health shows how well it is remembered. The body shows EITHER a grid of plant cards (each with a pixel plant sprite, topic name, a health label such as Blooming/Healthy/Needs water/Forgotten/Seedling, and a retrievability percentage or 'No reviews') plus a summary strip of health counts, OR a clear 'Your garden is empty' state with a link to set up subjects. This is a new account, so a populated garden is NOT required. A 404 or blank page is not acceptable.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Verify the page renders the 'Memory Garden' heading (not a 404 or blank screen) with the guidance about plants representing topics and their health

Verify the body renders exactly one of the two valid states: EITHER a grid of topic plant cards with health labels and a summary strip of health counts, OR the 'Your garden is empty' empty state with a link to set up subjects -- rather than an empty or broken container
